title: Why Tesla's upcoming stock split isn't likely to do much for the share price
text: Tesla's TSLA, -2.28% upcoming stock split will likely amount to a lot of sound and fury, signifying nothing. I say that not simply because splitting is an accounting entry — though it is true that, after Tesla's three-for-one split after the market closes on Aug. 24, shareholders will own precisely three times as many shares as before, with each worth one-third as much.
